title: ProfessionalClaim
description: Healthcare professional identity claim submitted by a Vitalis user

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for this claim record

profile_id.description: FK to profiles.id — the user submitting the claim

profession_type.description: Declared healthcare profession type (Turkish canonical values)

specialization.description: Optional sub-specialty or area of focus

institution_name.description: Name of the employing hospital, clinic, or university

city.description: City where the user primarily practices

claim_evidence_type.description: Type of evidence used to substantiate the claim

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the claim was submitted

verified_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the claim was approved; null if not yet approved

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the claim expires (license/chamber only); null for non-expiring docs
